source.language_note: Rulebook in Bahasa Indonesia; numerics reproduced in SI.
source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from a KRTI 2025 Racing-Plane class 5-inch FPV racing quadcopter 'sandwich' airframe (top plate + bottom plate + 4 radial arms + standoffs + motor mounts + FC stack + camera bracket + battery strap mounts). No rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt:
Design the primary airframe for a KRTI 2025 Racing-Plane (RP) class racing quadcopter as a multi-part bolted 'sandwich' assembly rather than a single monolithic top plate. Panduan KRTI 2025 RP class sets MTOW <= 2500 g, airframe is an X-configuration quadrotor with 5-inch (127 mm) propellers, 2207-size brushless motors producing up to 20 N thrust each, 6S LiPo battery. The assembly comprises: a CFRP top plate 180 x 130 x 2 mm (envelope matches original brief), a matching CFRP bottom plate, 4 radial arms to the motor stations, 4 motor mount pads at arm tips, vertical standoff columns between top and bottom plates, a camera/FPV bracket, a flight-controller (FC) stack mount (30.5 mm square), and battery strap mount lugs with two 80 x 8 mm longitudinal slots. Top plate has 20 mm corner holes for arm-bolt access (four arms attach via 4 x M3 bolts each in a 20 mm square pattern); central camera mount is a 40 mm diameter relief; FC mount is a 30.5 x 30.5 mm square pattern of four M3 through-holes; battery strap slots are two 80 x 8 mm longitudinal slots on centerline spaced 40 mm apart. Material: CFRP woven [0/90]s (Ex = Ey = 55 GPa, Gxy = 4 GPa, nu_xy = 0.05, density 1550 kg/m^3, tensile allowable 600 MPa, compressive 550 MPa, ILSS 55 MPa). Load cases: LC1 hover reaction (4 x 20 N upward at arm patterns + 9 N down at centroid); LC2 4 g pitch-up (4 x 80 N + 36 N down); LC3 15 g crash with one corner fixed; LC4 battery-strap retention 100 N per strap; LC5 vibration surrogate 3 x LC1. Pass/fail: (R1) max stress LC1/LC2/LC3/LC5 <= 400 MPa; (R2) LC1 centroid deflection <= 1.5 mm; (R3) LC2 buckling >= 3.0; (R4) LC3 plastic-strain surrogate <= 0.01; (R5) LC4 local bearing stress <= 300 MPa; (R6) top plate mass <= 35 g. Primary verification: linear static (x5) + linear buckling (LC2). Vibration modal, thermal, fluid, radiation not explicitly required. Deliverables: STEP AP242 assembly + report.

--- ASSEMBLY RECONFIGURATION ---
The frame is decomposed into: (A) CFRP top plate (180 x 130 x 2 mm, camera relief, FC pattern, battery slots); (B) CFRP bottom plate (180 x 130 x 2 mm, mirrored, carries LC3 corner reaction); (C) 4 CFRP radial arms sandwiched between plates (20 mm square M3 pattern at the root; motor pad at the tip); (D) 4 motor mount pads at arm tips (bolted to arm with 4x M3); (E) 4 aluminium standoff columns between top and bottom plates at the corners (M3 through-bolts); (F) camera / FPV bracket on the top plate 40 mm relief; (G) flight-controller stack mount plate (30.5 mm square vibration-isolated PCB stack carrier); (H) battery strap mount lugs with two 80 x 8 mm longitudinal slots for strap retention; (I) M3 fastener set (16 arm bolts + 4 standoff bolts + 4 FC bolts + 16 motor-pad bolts = ~40). Interfaces: IF1 top plate to arm (4x M3 per arm, 16 total); IF2 bottom plate to arm (16 total); IF3 arm tip to motor pad (4x M3 per pad, 16 total); IF4 standoffs between top and bottom plates (4 columns); IF5 camera bracket bolted to top plate; IF6 FC stack bolted to top plate at 30.5 mm square; IF7 battery strap lugs integral / bolted to top plate slots. FEM verification runs on the ASSEMBLED multi-body model only — per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail. Inter-part connection DCR must be <= 1.0 under the governing load case (LC3 15 g crash impact). All inherited load magnitudes, material properties, and pass/fail thresholds from the original single-part brief are preserved verbatim; assembly-scope criteria are added.
short_prompt:
Design the primary airframe for a KRTI 2025 Racing-Plane (RP) class racing quadcopter as a multi-part bolted 'sandwich' assembly. Panduan KRTI 2025 RP class: MTOW <= 2500 g, X-configuration quadrotor with 5-inch (127 mm) propellers, 2207-size brushless motors up to 20 N thrust each, 6S LiPo.

Envelope: CFRP top and bottom plates 180 x 130 x 2 mm. Arms attach via 4x M3 bolts on 20 mm square pattern; central camera mount 40 mm diameter relief; FC mount 30.5 x 30.5 mm square pattern of four M3 through-holes; battery strap slots two 80 x 8 mm longitudinal slots on centerline spaced 40 mm apart.

Material: CFRP woven [0/90]s (tensile allowable 600 MPa, compressive 550 MPa, ILSS 55 MPa).

Load cases: LC1 hover (4x 20 N up at arms + 9 N down at centroid); LC2 4 g pitch-up (4x 80 N + 36 N down); LC3 15 g crash with one corner fixed; LC4 battery-strap retention 100 N per strap; LC5 vibration surrogate 3x LC1.

Pass/fail: (R1) LC1/LC2/LC3/LC5 <= 400 MPa; (R2) LC1 centroid deflection <= 1.5 mm; (R3) LC2 buckling >= 3.0; (R4) LC3 plastic-strain surrogate <= 0.01; (R5) LC4 local bearing <= 300 MPa; (R6) top plate mass <= 35 g.

prompt.title: KRTI 2025 Racing-Plane 5-inch quadcopter frame (multi-part sandwich assembly)
prompt.brief: CFRP [0/90]s sandwich airframe for KRTI RP class racing quadcopter: top plate + bottom plate + 4 arms + 4 motor pads + 4 corner standoffs + camera bracket + FC stack mount + battery strap lugs + M3 fastener set. FEM verification at assembled level only; connection DCR <= 1.0 under LC3 governing 15 g crash.

boundary_conditions.mounting: LC1/LC2/LC5: symmetric 4-arm reaction; LC3: one arm root fully fixed; LC4: battery-slot perimeter fixed
boundary_conditions.loads: per-arm upward thrust + centroid mass, lateral shock, or strap tension

parts.name: top_plate
parts.role: upper CFRP plate carrying camera relief, FC stack pattern, and battery strap slots

parts.name: bottom_plate
parts.role: lower CFRP plate carrying LC3 corner reaction, mirrored arm-bolt pattern

parts.name: arm
parts.role: CFRP radial arm sandwiched between top and bottom plates

parts.name: motor_mount_pad
parts.role: motor mount pad at each arm tip for 2207 brushless motor

parts.name: standoff_column
parts.role: aluminium standoff column at each corner between top and bottom plates

parts.name: camera_bracket
parts.role: FPV / camera bracket on top plate 40 mm relief

parts.name: FC_stack_mount
parts.role: vibration-isolated FC stack carrier plate 30.5 x 30.5 mm

parts.name: battery_strap_lug
parts.role: battery strap mount lug at each of 2 longitudinal slots on top plate (80 x 8 mm)

parts.name: fastener_set
parts.role: M3 fastener family (arm bolts, standoff bolts, FC bolts, motor-pad bolts)

assembly_envelope.overall_bbox: ~220 mm motor-to-motor diagonal, 180 x 130 mm plate footprint, ~30 mm stack height (plate-plate separation)
assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: +X forward (camera direction), +Y right, +Z up; 4 arms at 45 deg about plate centroid

pass_fail_criteria.description: Connection demand-to-capacity ratio (DCR) across all inter-part interfaces <= 1.0 under the governing load case (LC3 15 g crash impact on one arm root).

interfaces.mediated_by: bolted (4x M3 per arm root at 20 mm pattern)
interfaces.load_path: arm thrust + LC3 crash reaction into top plate

interfaces.mediated_by: bolted (4x M3 per arm root, mirrored)
interfaces.load_path: arm-root sandwich clamp through bottom plate
motor thrust into motor pad at arm tip

interfaces.mediated_by: bolted (M3 through-bolt at each of 4 corners)
interfaces.load_path: plate-to-plate separation maintained by standoff columns; LC3 crash reaction through corner column
camera inertial load into top plate

interfaces.mediated_by: bolted (4x M3 at 30.5 mm square, silicone isolator)
interfaces.load_path: FC stack inertial load into top plate with vibration isolation
battery-strap retention load into top plate slot bearing

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. The LC3 15 g crash applied at one arm root loads the arm-to-plate bolted sandwich and the corner standoff column bolts before distributing through the bottom plate; assembly-level DCR is required, per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: A KRTI RP-class FPV racing quadcopter of this form factor is built as a CFRP top/bottom plate sandwich around radial arms with bolted motor pads, corner standoffs, camera bracket, FC stack carrier, and battery strap lugs rather than a single monolithic plate; LC3 crash and LC1/LC2 thrust loads cross multiple bolted sandwich interfaces.
notes.speculation_caveats: Inclusion of a mirrored bottom plate, 4 corner standoffs, camera/FPV bracket, FC stack mount, and battery strap lugs is programmatic speculation consistent with the KRTI RP class 5-inch topology; plate geometry, loads, material, and pass/fail thresholds inherit the original brief verbatim.
